sentiment.reasoning: Product recalls cause immediate costs and potential reputational damage to the software line.

sentiment.reasoning: Joint ventures offer potential long-term innovation benefits but have negligible immediate financial impact.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
